listening.title: Listening: Dreaming big
listening.transcript: If I had a lot of money, I would travel around the world. If I had more free time, I would learn a new language.

questions.question: What would the speaker do with a lot of money?
questions.explanation: "If I had a lot of money, I would travel around the world."

listening.title: Listening: Real plans vs dreams
listening.transcript: If it rains tomorrow, the match will be cancelled. If I won the lottery, I would buy a big house.

questions.question: What will happen if it rains tomorrow?
questions.explanation: "If it rains tomorrow, the match will be cancelled."
